themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Covers AI agents performing research tasks autonomously, interacting with tools, and managing workflows.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Focuses on AI tools that assist developers with writing, reviewing, and debugging code.

themes.name: AI research tools comparison
themes.description: Articles comparing different AI tools for research purposes, highlighting their features and effectiveness.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Content related to AI's ability to condense large amounts of text into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Explores how AI is used to automate or enhance usability testing processes for products and designs.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Articles discussing AI's application in analyzing user sentiment from reviews, feedback, and social media.

themes.name: AI qualitative research
themes.description: Content focusing on AI tools and methods for conducting and analyzing qualitative research data.

themes.name: AI recruitment research
themes.description: Examines the impact and use of AI in job markets, including displacement, skills, and hiring processes.

themes.name: AI survey tools
themes.description: Articles detailing AI applications for creating, distributing, and analyzing surveys.

themes.name: Synthetic users
themes.description: Discusses the creation and use of AI-generated personas or voices for testing and research.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
